jobDescription: We are looking for a Staff Software Engineer to lead our data infrastructure team. You will design and build large-scale data pipelines, mentor engineers, and collaborate cross-functionally.
tailoringNotes: Emphasized data pipeline experience and Kafka/Flink expertise. Foregrounded mentorship and leadership bullets. Moved DistCache project higher to highlight distributed systems background.

resume.name: Jane Doe
resume.summary: Staff-level software engineer with 8+ years of experience designing large-scale distributed systems and data pipelines. Proven track record of technical leadership, mentoring engineering teams, and driving infrastructure modernization initiatives.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Architected real-time data pipeline processing 2M events/day using Kafka and Flink, enabling sub-second analytics
Led migration of monolithic Python service to microservices, reducing p99 latency by 40% and operational toil by 60%
Mentored 4 junior engineers through weekly 1:1s, code reviews, and structured growth plans
Drove adoption of infrastructure-as-code with Terraform across 3 teams, cutting provisioning time from days to minutes

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Designed PostgreSQL schema and built ETL pipelines to ingest and transform 500GB+ of data
Built React/TypeScript frontend serving 50K daily active users
Containerized legacy Rails application with Docker and deployed to Kubernetes

experience.title: Junior Developer
bullets: Developed REST APIs using Node.js and Express for 5+ client projects
Maintained CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and automated integration tests

projects.name: DistCache
projects.description: Distributed in-memory cache with consistent hashing and replication

projects.name: OpenResume
projects.description: Open-source resume builder with AI-powered tailoring

leadership.description: Volunteer mentor for underrepresented students learning software development
